message:
refactor(connectors): cleanup across google-ai, pinecone, sendgrid, webhook-receiver

google-ai: Refactor URL building from nested match to if-let pattern
  with query_pairs_mut() API when URL parsing succeeds, falling back
  to manual string concatenation on failure.

webhook-receiver: Simplify from_params() return type from FcpResult<Self>
  to Self since the constructor cannot fail. Replace two map/unwrap_or_else
  chains with map_or_else for clarity.

pinecone: Prefix unused index_name variable with underscore to suppress
  compiler warning.

sendgrid: Format doc comment with inline code backticks for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
